Hello, I'm Kunjal

DevOps Engineer with 2.5 years of experience at Tata Elxsi. Skilled in CI/CD, containerization, and automation. Passionate about building scalable and efficient infrastructure.

About Me

I am a DevOps Engineer with strong foundation in Linux, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines. I have worked on automation, deployment strategies, and system design concepts. I also have exposure to automotive domain systems like V2I and embedded systems.

Experience

Tata Elxsi — DevOps Engineer

Experience: 2.5 Years

Worked on CI/CD pipelines, Docker-based deployments, and system automation. Experience with GitHub Actions, container orchestration basics, and environment setup.

Skills

Docker GitHub Actions Linux Git MySQL CI/CD Shell Scripting Kubernetes (Basics)

Projects

Multi-Tier Bank Application Deployment

Built and deployed a multi-tier application using Docker and MySQL. Configured environment variables and container networking.

CI/CD Pipeline using GitHub Actions

Automated build and deployment process using GitHub Actions including artifact upload and workflow automation.

V2I Communication System (POC)

Designed system-level architecture for Vehicle-to-Infrastructure communication including OBU, RSE, and central control system.
